content: Please run a static code review of the crate at crates/ragent-tui focusing on compliance, anti-patterns, unwrap/expect usage, println/eprintln, panics, concurrency, spawn usage, subprocess calls, env var handling, and large function complexity. Produce a JSON findings report and propose remediation milestones. Include file paths and line ranges for each finding.

Task 'task-001' and 'task-002' are high priority; please coordinate and ensure the final markdown report (docs/reports/ragent-tui-compliance.md) contains all findings, severity, file locations, suggested fixes, and a remediation plan with milestones and tasks including estimated hours. When complete, save the report to docs/reports/ragent-tui-compliance.md and mark task-001 as completed.
